testcase.name: @BeforeClass beforeClass
testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: Driver initialization failed for: chrome at utils.DriverFactory.initializeDriverWithAutoVersion(DriverFactory.java:41) at tests.BaseTest.beforeClass(BaseTest.java:45) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) Caused by: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500.
